arts.ttl: Arsenal & Chelsea join Real Madrid in hunt for Brazilian prodigy
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid have been joined in the hunt for one of Brazilian football’s standout talents by a pair of leading Premier League clubs. That’s according to Diario…

arts.ttl: Marc Cucurella throws boots in the bin after first-half nightmare at Tottenham
arts.sum: The Chelsea defender had a terrible first half but made amends after changing his footwear

arts.ttl: How Rangers can save Ange as Chris Sutton tells Tottenham fans what's coming
arts.sum: Sutton reminded Spurs fans they are still getting exactly what they demanded when former Celtic boss first arrived

arts.ttl: Cole Palmer breaks Man City legend’s astonishing Premier League record
arts.sum: One of the standout matches in the 2024-25 Premier League season took place this Sunday at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium, where Enzo Maresca’s Chelsea defeated Ange Postecoglou’s Spurs, securing second place in the standings. In addition to his perfect penalty record, Palmer has contributed 38 goal involvements (25 goals and 13 assists) in 2024, setting a new calendar year record for a Chelsea player, surpassing Jimmy Floyd Hasselbaink’s 36 in 2001, which he managed after moving back to England from Atlético Madrid.

arts.ttl: Postecoglou: Spurs squad still believe in my ideas
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has said the Tottenham squad still support his attacking philosophy and backed them to turn their season around after losing 4-2 to Chelsea on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Estevao Willian misses out on Brasileiro title, Chelsea legend earns survival with Fluminense
arts.sum: Future Chelsea signing Estevao Willian misses out on the Brasileiro title with Palmeiras after a 1-0 defeat to Thiago Silva's Fluminense.

arts.ttl: What Fulham fans could be heard chanting about Chelsea and Kai Havertz earlier on today
Romeo Lavia reveals X-rated wound as Chelsea midfielder sends Dejan Kulusevski wordless message
arts.sum: Discussing his half-time changes, he said: " First of all we had a problem with Romeo Lavia . However, speaking to reporters after the game, Enzo Maresca confirmed that Lavia had suffered a minor hamstring problem, so he was taken off as a precaution.

arts.ttl: Spurs players 'very happy' with Postecoglou - Romero
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur defender Cristian Romero says manager Ange Postecoglou still has the backing of the players after the club's frustrating 4-3 loss to Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Tottenham’s comedy of errors leaves questions over Ange Postecoglou’s future
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur 3-4 Chelsea: Cole Palmer scored two penalties as the Blues completed a comeback from two goals down at their London rivals
